ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-18-2016 Off Calendar

Motion For Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Apr-19-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840

Jill Bates-Moore, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff, NATIONAL COLLEGIATE STUDENT LOAN TRUST 2006-1, A DELAWARE STATUTORY TRUST(S),
No appearance by defaulted defendant KIMBERLY DARBOUZE,
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.
Court Granted Waiver of Witness Requirement on Hearing for Default Prove-up.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:
Damages: $26,173.57
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0
Attorney's Fees: $0
Costs: $613.20
Total Judgment in the amount of $26,786.77

Judgment signed in open court.
